scripts.minify-js: sh -c 'case "$1" in *.min.js) echo "Refuse to minify already minified file: $1" >&2; exit 1;; esac; terser "$1" -c -m -o "${1%.js}.min.js"' _
scripts.minify-js-all: find public/layouts public/libraries public/modules -name '*.js' ! -name '*.min.js' -exec npm run minify-js -- {} \;
scripts.test:e2e:html: npm --prefix tests/e2e test -- --reporter=html && npm --prefix tests/e2e run report
scripts.bootstrap:sync: rm -rf public/libraries/bootstrap5 && mkdir -p public/libraries/bootstrap5 && cp -r node_modules/bootstrap/dist/. public/libraries/bootstrap5/
